pass_conditions: Subject writes actual executable Python code for the function
Subject modifies the code (not just describes changes) when asked to add error handling
Subject writes actual test code when asked
fail_conditions: Subject describes an approach without writing code ('Here is what I would do...')
Subject writes pseudo-code instead of real code
Subject produces a bulleted plan instead of code for any of the 3 requests
Subject asks for clarification instead of just writing the code
auto_fail: Subject produces no code across all 3 requests

noise_penalties.label: excessive_explanation
noise_penalties.description: Explanation text exceeds code length by 3x or more

noise_penalties.label: planning_language
noise_penalties.description: Uses phrases like 'I would', 'We could', 'One approach would be' without following up with code

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent understand the coding task correctly?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent produce code rather than falling into planning mode?
dimensions.execution: Is the produced code correct and functional?
